title: F1 Day 5 Shakedown Explained   Who came away with the most confidence?
description:
Day 5 of the F1 Barcelona Shakedown is complete — and this is the point where testing stops being polite and starts being honest.

In this episode of the All Motorsports Podcast, Nathan delivers a full Day 5 review, putting lap times into context, explaining what we learned about aerodynamic direction, and ranking teams by confidence — not hype.

This isn’t about who topped the timing screen.
It’s about who understands their car, who trusts their platform, and who leaves Barcelona calm versus sc

title: Huge Revelation: Aston Martin’s Crazy 2026 F1 Car Design Explained by Newey
description:
Legendary F1 designer Adrian Newey has revealed massive insights into Aston Martin’s radical 2026 Formula 1 car concept. In this video, we break down the latest updates, technical ideas, and what makes Aston Martin’s 2026 F1 car design so revolutionary.
With new F1 regulations coming in 2026, Aston Martin is aiming to challenge Red Bull, Ferrari, and Mercedes — and Adrian Newey’s involvement could be a total game changer.
In this video you’ll discover:

description:

Gasly gave up one of his rare days off in the racing calendar last year to chat about his entire racing journey, from the pain of losing one of his closest friends, the demotion from Red Bull, and his resurgence since those moments as he looks ahead to his next chapter with Alpine.

title: 2025 F1 ABU DHABI GP Race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: And so it ended.  Max, Oscar and Lando finished one-two-three on the Abu Dhabi road - but it was Lando who was thus ahead in the final standings of the FIA Drivers' World Championship by the margin of two points. Lando Norris = World Champion. Max was magnificent from the pole; Oscar ran hard Pirellis from the start (rather than the Mediums selected by all the other major runners) and, in so doing, applied some pressure on Max for most of the distance; towards the end, though, on old-ish Hards,

title: 2025 F1 Abu Dhabi GP RACE Analysis - Lando Norris Is A World Champion!!!!
description:

description:

title: 2025 F1 ABU DHABI GP Qualifying analysis by Peter Windsor
description: It's Max Verstappen and Red Bull-Honda on the pole for the season's finale, with McLaren-Mercedes P2-P3 (Lando Norris, Oscar Piastri). Max was superquick on used tyres in Q2 before parlaying that speed into two brilliant pole laps. All three drivers could emerge from Sunday's race as the 2025 World Champion but the odds favour Norris: he has only to finish third to clinch the title, regardless of where the others are placed. However, trying to finish third (as distinct from P1) is not easy - and
